title: Activation Tree
description: Explore who activated a {{ledgerName}} wallet, which wallets it later activated, and how value spread through the network on {{explorerName}}.
search-hint: Default view shows {{ancestors}} generations up and {{descendants}} generations down.
genesis-description: Pick a genesis-era wallet to trace one of the oldest visible activation branches on the network.
focus-description: Showing {{descendants}} loaded descendants from the current branch with depth {{depth}}.
no-descendants: No descendants were found for this wallet in the loaded depth.
